name: Peanut Butter and Jelly Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, peanut butter, and flour. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in milk. Pour the batter over the crust.
4. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 250°F and continue baking for 40 minutes.
5. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and let it cool before removing the rim of the pan.
6. Stir the jelly until smooth and drizzle over the cheesecake in a lattice design. Chill.
Substitute:
1 cup old-fashioned or quick oats, uncooked
1/4 cup chopped peanuts
3 tbsp packed brown sugar
Note: The jelly is optional and can be replaced with strawberry jelly for variation.
